Open source projects in this category

ONLYOFFICE

Open source office suite with excellent MS Office compatibility.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Collabora Online

Browser-based LibreOffice for collaborative editing.

License: MPL-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

CryptPad

End-to-end encrypted collaboration suite.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

LibreOffice

The classic open source office suite for desktop.

License: MPL-2.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

DocuSeal

Open source DocuSign alternative — e-sign your own PDFs.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
